content.full_text:
Law Offices of

OLSON, CONNELLY, HAGEL, FONG & LEIDIGH

Nov 15 11:09 PM '90

November 14, 1990

Ms. Lynda Cassady
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street, Suite 600
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Ms. Cassady:

This letter is sent to request written confirmation
of advice you provided to me on behalf of my client, a
registered lobbying firm, based on the following
circumstances.

One of the firm's registered lobbyists left the firm
toward the end of the second quarter. After he left, he
did not engaged in any lobbying activities on behalf of
the firm's clients; he is currently employed as a
lobbyist by a state agency. On June 29, 1990, the firm
filed a Notice of Termination (Form 606) signed by a
responsible officer of the firm terminating the lobbyist
and an Amendment to Registration Statement (Form 605)
deleting the lobbyist from the firm's roster.
Subsequently, on August 7, 1990, the lobbyist filed a
Notice of Termination (Form 606) and a Lobbyist Report
(Form 615) for the second quarter of 1990.

I asked you whether the lobbyist was required to
file a Lobbyist Report with the firm's Lobbying Firm
Report for the third quarter of 1990. After consulting
with Carl Warnlow, you advised me that the termination
filed on June 29, 1990 by the lobbying firm would be
considered the termination and the subsequent filing by
the lobbyist himself would be treated as an amendment to
the termination filed by the firm. Consequently, since
the lobbyist was terminated prior to the beginning of the
third quarter, a Lobbyist Report would not be required
for the third quarter.

Thank you for your time and attention to this
matter.

Very truly yours,

OLSON, CONNELLY, HAGEL,
FONG & LEIDIGH

DIANE M. FISHBURN
DMF:sk

LANCE H. OLSON
BRUCE J. HAGEL
LEROY N. FONG
ROBERT E. LEIDIGH
GEORGE M. WATERS
DIANE M. FISHBURN

OF COUNSEL
LLOYD G. CONNELLY, Member
California State Legislature

300 Capitol Mall, Suite 350
Sacramento, California 95814
TELEPHONE (916) 442-2952
FAX: (916) 442-1280

OLSON, CONNELLY, HAGEL, FONG & LEIDIGH

Nov 19 H 09 FH '90

Ms. Lynda Cassady

I asked you whether the lobbyist was required to
file a Lobbyist Report with the firm's Lobbying Firm

considered the termination and the subsequent filing by
the lobbyist himself would be treated as an amendment to
the termination filed by the firm. Consequently, since
the lobbyist was terminated prior to the beginning of the

for the third quarter.

Thank you for your time and attention to this
matter.

Very truly yours,

OLSON, CONNELLY, HAGEL,
FONG & LEIDIGH

DIANE M. FISHBURN
DMF:sk

LANCE H. OLSON
BRUCE J. HAGEL
LEROY Y. FONG
ROBERT E. LEIDIGH
GEORGE M. WATERS
DIANE M. FISHBURN

OF COUNSEL
LLOYD G. CONNELLY, Member
California State Legislature

300 Capitol Mall, Suite 350
Sacramento, California 95814
TELEPHONE: (916) 442-2952
FAX: (916) 442-1280
